title: Project Funeral
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Project Funeral''' was one of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s most ambitious plots.

The brainwashing technique developed by the scientists on [[Project Minefield]] were applied to large numbers of nonhuman individuals throughout the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The intention of the operation was to strain relations between [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and nonhumans. By ordering nonhumans to attack various targets, Humans would be forced to fear those alien species. Non-Humans would then become resentful as they were treated with suspicion.

For a while, the project was successful. Various attacks by [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]] including the attempted assassinations of [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] caused the New Republic to suspend Twi'leks from important positions. Two terrorist attacks and an attempt by a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] to kill [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] cast suspicion on that species as well.

[[Wraith Squadron]] conducted a brainstorming session to determine the key points of Zsinj's plan, and Wedge Antilles forwarded their conclusions to [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] at [[New Republic Intelligence Service]]. NRI then thwarted an attempt by [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] pilot [[Rostat Manr]] to crash the cruise liner ''[[Nebula Queen]]''. By using his Sullustan subordinate to prevent the crash, NRI avoided causing further interspecies enmity. A similar [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] effort to cause a computer-induced explosion of a power plant was also stopped.

When [[Edda Gast]] provided the chemical markers of Project Minefield brainwashing, Project Funeral crews were captured all over [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. This marked the end of both projects.

===Known subjects===
*Lieutenant [[Jart Eyan]] (attempted to kill [[Gial Ackbar]], and killed Ackbar's aide, killed by [[Voort saBinring]])
*Flight officer [[Nuro Tualin]] (attacked the ''[[Mon Remonda]]'' in an [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]], shot down by [[Tyria Sarkin Tainer]])
*Lieutenant [[Tal'dira]] (attacked Wedge Antilles in [[X-wing starfighter]], resisted programming enough to allow himself to be shot down by [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]])
*[[Tolokai]] (attempted to kill Mon Mothma, killed by [[Malan Tugrina]])
*[[Rostat Manr]] (attempted to crash ''Nebula Queen'' into [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Incapacitated by [[Nurm]] and taken into custody by [[New Republic Intelligence]])

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
